gate_a_contract.name: Contract Gate (Dashboard <-> API)
requirements: Define endpoint, method, request/response schema, and auth for every UI action
Fail build if UI calls a non-existent route or wrong method

gate_b_e2e.name: E2E Gate (Playwright)
requirements: Deals list loads and detail loads
Onboarding email settings opens and saves

gate_d_no_dead_ui.name: No Dead UI Gate
requirements: Static scan finds no empty/TODO onClick
No UI calls to unknown routes

phases.name: R4-0
phases.title: Baseline Contract Inventory
phases.objective: Produce definitive UI action map and verify against backend routes.
tasks: Enumerate all fetch/apiFetch/agentClient calls and map to actions
Export backend route list and compare to UI map
Script curl checks for each action endpoint and record 404/405

phases.name: R4-1
phases.title: Endpoint Contract Stabilization
phases.objective: Fix route/method mismatches and reserved slug routing.
tasks: Add /deals/new route or guard reserved slugs in /deals/[id]
Implement /api/deals/bulk-archive or adjust UI to loop single archive
Normalize API key injection for all write requests
Fix /api/actions/clear-completed and bulk endpoints or remove buttons

phases.name: R4-2
phases.title: Quarantine Workflow Fix
phases.objective: Approvals and previews operate on canonical quarantine endpoints.
tasks: Switch approve/reject to /api/quarantine/{id}/process or implement action execute endpoints
Fix preview endpoint to /api/quarantine/{id}
Implement delete/hide or remove delete UI
acceptance_criteria: Approve creates deal and removes item

phases.name: R4-3
phases.title: Actions Execution + Bulk Ops
phases.objective: Ensure action lifecycle endpoints exist and UI uses them.
tasks: Implement /api/actions/{id}/execute|cancel|retry|update
Implement /api/actions/clear-completed and bulk endpoints or adjust UI
Resolve /api/actions/capabilities conflict

phases.name: R4-4
phases.title: Chat UX + Truth
phases.objective: Correct rendering and align agent data source with UI.
tasks: Add markdown renderer and sanitize output
Add provenance indicators and RAG freshness badges
Ensure agent deal count uses DB counts or reindex before responding
acceptance_criteria: Deal counts match or are labeled

phases.name: R4-5
phases.title: Settings + Onboarding Product Hardening
phases.objective: Real email integration and durable settings.
tasks: Build email integration settings using /api/integrations/email/*
Replace mock onboarding email with real OAuth
Persist onboarding state to backend
Fix provider test endpoint to use /health

phases.name: R4-6
phases.title: Observability + Regression Proof
tasks: Add correlation_id header from UI to backend
Add Playwright suite for critical actions
Add No Dead UI static scan in CI
acceptance_criteria: Trace ID visible in dashboard and backend logs
